speaker: Diederich
text: How'd your meetin’ with Lord Scheat go today? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: He’s weird… Not at all how I imagined a dragon acting. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: He’s always bored, you know. Sometimes he just does stuff for the hell of it.

speaker: Argo
text: Even dragons can get bored, huh?

speaker: Diederich
text: Well, he just doesn’t get out that much. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Dragons in other countries ain’t huge shut-ins like him. *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: "Oops, don’t tell Lord Scheat I said that, okay? He'll be pissed at me."

speaker: Diederich
text: But someone like you might ‘em to open up more.

speaker: Diedereich
text: You’re a bit different from everyone else. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: You should try talkin' to him every once a while. I’m sure he’d appreciate it. *
